questions.questionText: 母は炊事も洗濯も裁縫も文句のつけようがないが、<u>唯一</u>掃除が苦手だ。
questions.explanation: The correct reading for 唯一 (only, sole) is ゆいいつ.

questions.questionText: 遅刻した者は棄権したものと___。
questions.explanation: みなす (見なす) means 'to regard as' or 'to consider as'. The sentence means 'Those who are late will be regarded as having forfeited.'

questions.questionText: 長年の研究が評価され、感激の___です。
questions.explanation: 感激の至り (the utmost emotion/deeply moved) uses the grammar structure 'Noun + の至り' meaning 'the height of'.
